title: pulicaria crispa subsp. candidissima
intro: Pulicaria crispa subsp. candidissima, also known as the white fleabane, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pulicaria crispa subsp. candidissima include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or used in infusion form to harness its medicinal properties, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
